meta.title: Taste Garden — Asian all-you-can-eat world cuisine in Izegem
meta.description: 8 kitchens and a drinks bar — fresh, all-you-can-eat and included in one formula. Reserve your table at Taste Garden, Kortrijksestraat 276, Izegem.

availability.label: Reservations temporarily unavailable
availability.holidayReserveBody: During our holiday we are not taking reservations. Please check the announcement above the reservation form for the exact period.
availability.holidayCallBody: During our holiday, calling through the website is temporarily unavailable. Please check the announcement above the reservation form for the exact period.
availability.manualReserveBody: Reservations are closed today because we are fully booked. Please try again later.
availability.manualCallBody: We are fully booked today; calling through the website is temporarily disabled. Please try again later.

hero.subtitle: Enjoy unlimited teppanyaki, wok, sushi, desserts and drinks — freshly prepared in the heart of Izegem.

concept.title: One price. The whole world on your plate.
concept.body: At Taste Garden you don't choose just one thing — you taste it all. Across eight open kitchens and our drinks bar, enjoy everything without limits: teppanyaki, wok, sushi, dessert, cold and warm starters, hot mains and sides.

stations.title: 8 kitchens. 1 drinks bar. Live before your eyes
stations.intro: Move through our open stations and drinks bar — from teppanyaki, wok and sushi to warm dishes, dessert and your favourite drink.

items.name: Teppanyaki
items.description: Pick your favourites and have them cooked à la minute on the teppan: hot, fragrant and full of flavour.

items.name: Wok
items.description: Build your plate with vegetables, sauce and toppings; the chef stir-fries it over high heat.

items.name: Sushi bar
items.description: Maki, nigiri and rolls for a light start or a fresh bite between plates.

items.name: Dessert buffet
items.description: End your visit with dessert, fruit and ice cream: a small taste or one last generous plate.

items.name: Cold starters
items.description: Light cold bites to ease into your meal or refresh your plate between courses.

items.name: Warm starters
items.description: Saucy peeled shrimp, baked red fish, fries, crispy rolls and nuggets — each warm starter in its own buffet section.

items.name: Warm main courses
items.description: Savoury mains to mix and match your way, from mild to spicy.

items.name: Warm side dishes
items.description: Warm sides that complete your plate, easy to pair with wok, grill or buffet dishes.

items.name: Drinks bar
items.description: Soft drinks, draft beer, house wine, coffee and tea are included with your formula.

dishes.title: Choose your favourites for home
dishes.intro: From spicy soup to wok classics — explore the full takeaway menu and choose easily by category.

notes.title: Sauces of your choice
notes.sauces: Chef's sauce · Curry sauce (spicy) · Sweet-and-sour sauce · Spicy sauce · Gonbao sauce (mildly spicy)
notes.veg: Includes vegetables, also available with bean sprouts (on request)

formules.title: Unlimited dining, one clear price
formules.intro: Soft drinks, draft beer, house wine, coffee and tea are all included.

birthday.title: Birthday?
birthday.body: Is it your birthday on the day itself, or within 3 days before or after the day you dine with us? Then you pay just €15.00, provided you're accompanied by at least 3 other adults — on presentation of your ID card.

details.alaMinute: All à la minute · as much as you like

formules.note: Reservation recommended, especially on festive days.

ambiance.body: At world-kitchen Taste Garden in Izegem, you can enjoy an extensive choice of food and drinks à volonté — soft drinks, draft beer, house wines, coffee and tea — for one fixed price. We work in buffet style, which means you can take your own food and drinks.

practical.title: Good to know

focusRule.title: Tuesday–Thursday
focusRule.body: On Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday, reservations are dinner only.
focusRule.holiday: If a public holiday falls on Monday, we open on Monday and close on Tuesday.

rules.title: Lunch days
rules.body: Lunch is only available on Friday, Saturday, Sunday and public holidays.

rules.title: Tuesday–Thursday
rules.body: On Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday, reservations are dinner only.

rules.title: Monday public holiday
rules.body: We open on that Monday and close on Tuesday.

practical.lunchNote: Lunch only on Friday, Saturday, Sunday & public holidays — other days, evenings only.
practical.hoursNote: Closed on Monday, except public holidays.

reservation.title: Reserve your table
reservation.intro: Leave us your details — we'll confirm your reservation as soon as possible. Prefer to call? You're always welcome to.
rules: On Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday, reservations are dinner only from 18:00.
Public holiday on Monday? We open Monday and close Tuesday.

form.holidayBlockedDate: Closed for holiday on this date
form.afterHolidayClosed: Closed: Tuesday after a Monday public holiday
form.lunchUnavailable: Lunch is not available on this date
form.name: Name

success.title: Thank you for your request!
success.body: We've received your reservation and will get back to you shortly to confirm.

reservation.error: Something went wrong. Feel free to call us on 051 30 38 88.
reservation.closedBody: We are fully booked today and are temporarily not taking new reservations.
reservation.closedHint: Reservation and calling through the website are temporarily blocked
reservation.holidayClosedBody: During our holiday we are not taking reservations. The announcement above shows the exact period.

footer.tagline: All-you-can-eat world cuisine in the heart of Izegem.
